description: Fragment of an incomplete legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (1100–1138 CE). There are two lines, mentioning the late Abū l-Faraj Hibatallāh Netanʾel. On verso, in a different hand, it says "qiyām: 47. to his mother: 21." (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
